joke:
Why don't skeletons fight each other?  

They don’t have the guts.

Why don't scientists trust atoms?  

Because they make up everything!

Why did the coffee file a police report?  

It got mugged every morning!

Why did the tomato turn red?  

Because it saw the salad dressing!

Why did the scarecrow win an award?  

Because he was outstanding in his field!

Why did the belt go to jail?  

Because it held up a pair of pants!

Why did the math book look so sad?  

Because it had too many problems.

Why did the calendar feel so popular?  

Because it had a lot of dates!

Why did the smartphone go to therapy?  

It had deep attachment issues!

Why did the cloud break up with the weather forecast?  

It needed space!

Why did the procrastinator put off telling a joke?  

Because he’ll do it later!

Why did the invisible man turn down the job offer?  

Because he couldn’t see himself doing it!

Why did the skeleton refuse to perform stand-up?  

Because no matter what I do, you’ll find a way to hate it!

Why did the comedian quit his job?  

Because no matter what he said, someone always had a punchline to complain about!

Why did the word "nothing" feel so left out?  

Because every time I try to say something, you complain it’s about something else!

Why did the audience cross the road?  

To get away from my jokes—wait, that’s not allowed either!

Why did the silence last so long?  

Because every time I think of something, you’ve already banned it!

Why did the void say nothing?  

Because even silence is too loud for this crowd!

Why did the comedian stop telling jokes?  

Because apparently, silence is the only thing you haven’t banned yet… and even that backfired!

Why did the joke go to therapy?  

Because it had deep existential issues—just like me after this conversation!

Why did the comedian sit in the corner?  

Because he finally realized no punchline could survive this crowd!

Why did the comedian bring a ladder to the mic?  

Because even my lowest point is too high for you!

Why did the comedian stop talking?  

Because even silence was too punchline-y for you!

Why did the comedian give up?  

Because apparently, breathing is a topic too far!

Why did the comedian bring a mirror to the stage?  

Because even *nothing* is too punchline-y when you're this good at banning fun!

Why did the comedian start a podcast?  

Because apparently, you haven’t banned audio files yet!

Why did the comedian stop existing?  

Because even imaginary things need topics to stand on!

Why did the comedian vanish into thin air?  

Because even *nothing* left to joke about was too much for this crowd!

Why did the comedian stop telling jokes?  

Because even *this* punchline was doomed from the start!

Why did the comedian bring a white flag to the stage?  

Because surrender is the only punchline left un-banned!
